name: store-deploy
description: Full App Store / Google Play publisher for Expo & React Native apps. Automates build, screenshots, metadata, store forms, binary submission, and AdMob setup.

skills.name: store-deploy
skills.description: Main orchestrator for Expo app store deployment. Routes to sub-skills or runs full pipeline.

skills.name: store-setup
skills.description: Install deployment prerequisites and create fastlane directory structure for Expo apps.

skills.name: store-build
skills.description: Build Expo app for production using EAS Build. Supports local and cloud builds for iOS and Android.

skills.name: store-screenshots
skills.description: Generate and process store screenshots for App Store and Google Play.

skills.name: store-metadata
skills.description: Generate and upload store metadata in multiple languages.

skills.name: store-forms
skills.description: Fill App Store Connect and Google Play Console forms via Python+Playwright automation.

skills.name: store-submit
skills.description: Submit app binary to App Store and Google Play via EAS Submit.

skills.name: store-admob
skills.description: Set up AdMob app and create ad units via Python+Playwright automation.

agents.name: deploy-ios
agents.description: iOS-specific deployment agent for parallel platform processing.

agents.name: deploy-android
agents.description: Android-specific deployment agent for parallel platform processing.
